title: BasicRedeemHook.getLiquidAssets uses msg.sender instead of address(this)
claim: The getLiquidAssets view function uses msg.sender as the vault address instead of address(this), while callHook correctly uses address(this). This inconsistency causes incorrect vault resolution when called externally.
impact: External calls to getLiquidAssets will query the wrong vault address (msg.sender) instead of the hook's associated vault, returning incorrect liquidity data that could cause integration failures or incorrect lending/borrowing decisions.
paths: 1. External caller calls getLiquidAssets(asset) on BasicRedeemHook
3. Returns balance of msg.sender contract instead of the vault the hook is attached to
